subcodes.first_line: O thou who art aflame with the kindled fire, it behoveth thee to turn thy face towards Him Who hath created the heavens and the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المشتعل بالنار الموقده لمثلک ینبغی ان یوجه وجهه للذی فطر السموات و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
